subcodes.first_line: O Afnan of the Sacred Lote-Tree! In these two days 'Abdu'l-Bahá is bound for distant lands; no time [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای افنان سدره مبارکه عبدالبهاء در این دو روزه عازم بلاد بعیده است ابدا وقت
subcodes.subjects: @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
